item.title: Nvidia GTC 2026: 5 AI Chips Powering Apple's AirPods Max 2 and Netflix Oscars
item.description: Nvidia's GTC 2026 is dropping game-changing AI chips that are already transforming Apple's new AirPods Max 2 with real-time translation magic and boosting Netflix's Oscar-winning hits—here's how it all connects amid today's wild market swings, plus tips for what it means for you.
